episodes.title: Subway Terror, Japan's Cult Attack in Tokyo | Agent John’s Crime Files EP3
episodes.description:
Description: In 1995, Japan faced one of its most shocking public safety incidents when a dangerous chemical was released in the Tokyo subway during rush hour.

In this episode, former FBI Legal Attaché John Schachnovsky explains what happened, how Japanese police built the case, and why this investigation changed modern law enforcement in Asia.

Connect with John on Instagram for behind-the-scenes updates and even more true crime stories!
https://www.instagram.com/johnschach_author/
.
